name: TestGetWaitADASDetectedObject
title: TestGetWaitADASDetectedObject
description: If a Detected Object was the last event that triggered a wait Instruction, the name of the Detected Object can be called up with the TestGetWaitADASDetectedObject function.

parameters.name: detectedObjectName
parameters.description: The name of the Detected Object that triggered the wait instruction.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
